title: Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides
heading: Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides
parentHeadings: Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides
content:
-   This solution **requires a Clever Secure Sync integration**.
-   AnySchool extends Secure Sync for use with schools that are not on Clever.
-   You do not need to build additional code or maintain a separate integration for AnySchool.
-   AnySchool data is exposed through the Clever API in the same way as on-Clever data.
-   This is not a separate integration, but it does require additional scopes.
-   AnySchool is enabled on your production application by default.

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Development app scopes**
> 
> [](#development-app-scopes)
> 
> By default, your Clever development app includes **Clever Library (Classroom)** and **Clever Single Sign-On** scopes. To request **Clever Secure Sync** and **Clever LMS Connect** scopes, contact [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#99f8e9e9f5f0faf8edf0f6f7b4f0f7edfcebfceaedd9faf5fceffcebb7faf6f4).

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Working with districts**
> 
> [](#working-with-districts)
> 
> Learn how applications connect with districts:
> 
> -   [For District Admins: Add or Remove Apps](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/203114997?language=en_US)
> -   [For App Partners: Inviting & Connecting Districts to Your App](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/215120718?language=en_US)

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Available fields**
> 
> [](#available-fields)
> 
> For a detailed list of fields available for each integration type, check the [Clever API Schema](https://clever.com/schema).

## 

Clever Library

[](#clever-library)

Clever Library is not included with a Clever Complete subscription. If you want to build with Clever without a Clever Complete subscription, start with a Clever Library integration.

### 

Overview

[](#overview)

Use Clever Library when your app is designed for teacher-managed setup and classroom-level rostering.

-   Teachers manage the connection.
-   Teachers can add your application through the [Clever Library](https://clever.com/library).
-   Teachers can provision accounts for themselves and their students on demand.
-   To learn more, see [Library SSO + Classroom Rostering](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-sso).

> 🚧
> 
> ### 
> 
> Clever Library is not included with a Clever Complete subscription
> 
> [](#clever-library-is-not-included-with-a-clever-complete-subscription)
> 
> You can build a Clever Library integration without a Clever Complete subscription. A Clever Library integration is free to build.

> ❗️
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Accessing district and school data**
> 
> [](#accessing-district-and-school-data)
> 
> Default Clever Library (Classroom) scopes do not provide access to district-level or school-level data. To request this access, contact [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d5b4a5a5b9bcb6b4a1bcbabbf8bcbba1b0a7b0a6a195b6b9b0a3b0a7fbb6bab8).

### 

Clever Library integration experience

[](#clever-library-integration-experience)

When a teacher selects a new app from the Clever Library or clicks "Sign Up with Clever," Clever shows a consent screen that asks the teacher to authorize data sharing with your app. After consent, Clever redirects the teacher to your app, where you complete the OAuth Single Sign-On flow and query user identity and classroom information. The teacher account is provisioned immediately, and the app becomes available in the [Clever Portal](https://clever.com/products/sso) for the teacher and their students.

#### 

Teacher sign-up entry points

[](#teacher-sign-up-entry-points)

1.  Teachers discover your app in the Clever Library and click "Install."
2.  Teachers click the "Sign Up with Clever" button on your website's teacher sign-up page.

#### 

Data shared after teacher consent

[](#data-shared-after-teacher-consent)

**Teacher object data**

-   Clever ID
-   Full name
-   Email address

**Teacher’s shared sections**

-   Clever ID
-   Section name
-   Section number
-   Teachers
-   Students
-   Subject
-   Grade, if available from the SIS

**Student object data in shared sections**

-   Clever ID
-   Name
-   Grade, if available from the SIS

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Working with teachers**
> 
> [](#working-with-teachers)
> 
> Learn how teachers connect applications in Clever:
> 
> -   [For Teachers: Adding Applications](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/360013488672?language=en_US)
